findings.location: s5 — assertSqlResultSetEqualsメソッドの注意点
findings.description: The knowledge file states "ORDER BY指定がある場合は順序も厳密に比較する必要がある" (when ORDER BY is specified, strict order comparison is needed), but the source says "SELECT実行時はORDER BY指定がなされる場合がほとんどであり、順序についても厳密に比較する必要がある" — meaning ORDER BY is typically used, therefore strict ordering is always enforced. The knowledge file incorrectly frames this as a conditional ("when ORDER BY exists") rather than stating it as universal behavior justified by the common use of ORDER BY.
findings.source_evidence: SELECT実行時はORDER BY指定がなされる場合がほとんどであり、順序についても厳密に比較する必要がある為。
